text.title: gha-matrix-builds Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gha-matrix-builds as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Uploading artifacts from all matrix combinations with the same name.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Artifact names must be unique per workflow run. Duplicate names cause upload failures or silent overwrites; use matrix variables in the name.

failure-mode.description: Running deployment or release jobs as a matrix.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Deploys should target one specific artifact built from one specific combination, not fan out across platforms. Use needs: [test] and a single deploy job.
